name: tester
description: Create and run unit / integration / E2E (Playwright) tests, verify RPA tests, debug failures, enforce coverage targets (80% lines / 75% branches), and manage test infra (server health protocol). Triggers on: test, unit test, integration, e2e, coverage, playwright, jest, vitest, spec, ทดสอบ, ตรวจสอบ,
